positioning.zh: 旅游创业者 / 视觉设计师 / AI 产品实践者
positioning.en: Travel-tech founder, visual designer, and AI-assisted product builder
positioning.summaryZh: 以设计表达审美，以 AI 放大执行力，把旅行、内容与产品变成可展示的作品。
positioning.summaryEn: I build visual systems, AI-assisted products, and travel-tech experiences that turn ideas into usable digital work.

contact.note: Open to collaboration / portfolio showcase / product building

projects.title: Ego Travel / 易旅出行
projects.description: A Gen Z travel planning product focused on DIY itineraries, AI-assisted planning, and creator-led travel experiences.

projects.title: DIY Itinerary Builder
projects.description: A timeline-based itinerary editor with drag-and-drop planning, day tabs, route structure, and visual schedule organization.

projects.title: Mac Dynamic Island
projects.description: A macOS native notch-style interaction concept with clipboard history, activity notifications, timers, and refined Apple-like UI behavior.

projects.title: AI Visual Workflow / SkuBoard
projects.category: AI Design Tool / Image Template System
projects.description: An AI-assisted visual production workflow for template replacement, product image preparation, background cleanup, and export-ready design boards.

projects.title: Kids Coding Course
projects.description: A Code.org-inspired children’s programming course interface with interactive levels, visual feedback, Blockly-style learning, and playful AI-assisted teaching.

projects.title: WeChat Content Covers
projects.description: A series of metaphorical minimalist charcoal cover images for公众号 articles, using strong visual symbolism and consistent art direction.

experience: Travel-tech startup exploration and WeChat mini-program product design
Independent product prototyping with AI-assisted coding and visual workflows
Editorial content creation, WeChat content covers, and visual storytelling
